name: Capital Allocation
description: The single most important function of a CEO: directing resources toward highest-return opportunities. Most value creation and destruction happens here.
examples: Berkshire's continuous reallocation. Jio's $30B network bet. Buffett's insurance float as perpetual low-cost capital.
counterExamples: GE Capital under Welch — financial leverage masking industrial decay. Kingfisher Airlines debt-funded expansion.
